items.title: DRAS
items.paragraph1: DRAS Engineers and Contractors is a professional practice firm specializing in Project and Construction Management Services. At our company, we specialize in providing high-quality Construction and Consultancy for residential, commercial, institutional, industrial sheds, and hospitality projects. We take pride & immense satisfaction in providing end-to-end solutions to our clients.

items.title: RESIDENTIAL BUILDING
items.description: Our construction services for residential buildings focus on creating comfortable and functional homes, combining quality craftsmanship with a personalized design to meet the unique needs of homeowners.

items.title: COMMERCIAL BUILDING
items.description: Our construction services for commercial buildings cater to businesses and organizations, delivering efficient and aesthetically pleasing spaces that promote productivity and leave a lasting impression on clients and customers

items.title: INSTITUTIONAL BUILDING
items.description: We specialize in construction services for institutional buildings such as schools, hospitals, and public facilities, providing safe and welldesigned environments that support the specific needs and activities of these institutions.

items.title: INDUSTRIAL BUILDING
items.description: Our construction services for industrial buildings encompass the design and construction of structures that facilitate manufacturing, storage, and logistical operations, prioritizing functionality, durability, and compliance with industry regulations.

items.client: POWER GRID CORPORATION OF INDIA LIMITED

cards.title: Construction of RCC Drain, Repairing of Existing drain & Sump Pit at Township Area of WR-1 RHQ, Nagpur

overview.challenge: The existing masonry drain was damaged and required complete dismantling and reconstruction under space constraints.
overview.result: The RCC drain was successfully constructed with improved durability and proper drainage system without affecting operations.

cards.title: Installation Of False Ceiling & Electrification Work of Sabrang Hall at Powergrid Pocket-A, RHQ, Nagpur

overview.challenge: The hall required modern false ceiling installation along with proper electrical setup under tight deadlines.
overview.result: A high-quality ceiling and electrical system was installed, improving aesthetics and functionality.

cards.title: Renovation of ED Office, Conference Hall & Staff Room on 1st Floor of Office Building at RHQ Nagpur

overview.challenge: Renovation had to be done without interrupting office work.
overview.result: Modern interiors and efficient layouts were delivered smoothly with zero disruption.

cards.title: Dismantling of existing workstation and floor tiles for installation of new workstation at POWERGRID, Nagpur

overview.challenge: Existing infrastructure required safe dismantling and quick replacement.
overview.result: New workstations were installed efficiently with improved usability and design.

cards.title: Security Post and Canopy at Main gate, MECL, Seminary Hills, Nagpur

overview.challenge: Dismantling the existing security post at the high-traffic entrance of MECL, Nagpur under stringent safety protocols, phased permits, delayed site handover, and monsoon constraints.
overview.result: The project encompassed comprehensive execution of RCC, civil finishes (brickwork, plastering, tiling, painting, UPVC windows, flush and wooden doors), along with complete plumbing, sanitary, and electrical works.

items.client: GRINDWELL NORTON LIMITED (SAINT GOBAIN GROUP OF COMPANY)

cards.title: Proposed Modification of RCC Machine Foundation at rindwell Norton Limited , G51, MIDC Butibori, Nagpur

overview.challenge: Modification of an existing machine foundation in a constrained factory core area under strict safety, limited access, unknown conditions, and a 15-day deadline, involving RCC demolition and manual material handling over 500 metres.
overview.result: Prepared and executed a detailed method statement aligning with client requirements, mitigated risks with enhanced resources, and successfully delivered the project on time acting as both consultant and contractor from specification to completion.

cards.title: Proposed Construction of New Meter Room at Grindwell Norton, G51, MIDC Butibori, Nagpur

overview.challenge: Construction of a new meter room core and shell with basic finishes between two existing buildings, involving deep excavation near existing foundations and live electrical cables under tight space and high safety constraints.
overview.result: Developed and executed a detailed method statement, safely relocated live electrical cables, completed RCC foundation and plinth works, and progressing toward project delivery within 45 days in line with client expectations.

items.client: LEMKEN India Agro Equipment Pvt Ltd

cards.title: Stone masonry (Random Rubble) Compound Wall & Road Cross Drainage work

overview.challenge: Collapse of compound wall due to surcharge load, lack of column support over a 30 m stretch, and highly congested site conditions.
overview.result: Redesigned with intermediate RCC columns and successfully reconstructed with ensured stability, quality, and safety.

cards.title: Proposed Rooftop Polycarbonate Sheet Replacement Works

overview.challenge: Replacement of rooftop polycarbonate sheets at height under weather exposure, ensuring safety, leak-proofing, and minimal disruption to ongoing operations.
overview.result: Successfully completed installation with enhanced durability and weather resistance, meeting safety standards and project timelines.

cards.title: Proposed Logistic Park, Joga, Saoner ,Dist - Nagpur

overview.challenge: Execution of multiple large-scale structures (6 logistic sheds, 3 auxiliary buildings, and 725 RMT boundary wall) with coordination of resources, space management, and maintaining quality and safety across concurrent works.
overview.result: Successfully delivered all structures within the planned scope, achieving required quality standards and project timelines.

overview.challenge: Construction of a 27 lakh litre fire water tank involving large-capacity RCC works, strict fire safety compliance, waterproofing requirements, and coordination within an operational industrial environment.
overview.result: Successfully delivered a fully compliant and leak-proof fire water tank meeting capacity, safety standards, and project timelines.

footer.description: Whether you are planning a new residential development, commercial facility, institutional building, or industrial project, we have the expertise and dedication to bring your vision to life.
footer.address: HOUSE 395, PANDHURNA ROAD, GURHARIKAR LAYOUT, CHICHIPURA, SAONER 441107, DIST- NAGPUR, ST- MAHARASHTRA

visionary.title: OUR
paragraphs: Mr. Deepanshu Dilipkumar Namdeo founded DRAS ENGINEERS AND CONTRACTORS in 2022, marking the beginning of his entrepreneurial journey. In 2026, we transformed into BYCC Pvt.Ltd to reach new heights.

A B.E. Civil Engineer, Mr. Deepanshu initially gained valuable experience in Planning, Execution, Commercial (client and Sub- subcontractor billing), procurement and contract of Residential Buildings, Commercial Buildings, Industrial Buildings, and Institutional Building.

With a passion for construction and a strong background in the industry, he has embarked on this exciting journey to offer exceptional construction solutions tailored to the unique needs of our clients. We leverage the latest technologies and construction techniques to ensure efficient and sustainable outcomes for every project we undertake.

items.title: Vision
items.description: To create Structures that inspire, uplift, and leave a lasting legacy. We envision a future where our work stands as a testament to our unwavering Commitment to Excellence, Quality, and Client satisfaction.

items.title: Mission
items.description: To deliver phenomenal Construction services, built on Integrity, Quality, and Client satisfaction while fostering long-term relationships with our partners and communities.

items.title: Goal
items.description: We take pride in our attention to detail, adherence to industry standards, and commitment to excellence. Our goal is to deliver projects on time, within budget, and with the highest level of craftsmanship.
